payload.answer: I don’t yet have any stored open ideas from you about knowledge graphs. Can you tell me what specific aspects you’re curious about (e.g., how they work, tools, modeling, querying, building one, or examples)?

entity_resolution.reason: No existing durable memory or extracted open ideas about knowledge graphs were provided in the input context.

details: No durable memory was found in the provided context, so none was committed.

repair_options: Ask the user to list their open questions/interests about knowledge graphs so they can be stored as durable memory.
Use a follow-up to prompt for categories (definitions, construction, ontology/schema design, SPARQL/queries, embeddings, integration, tooling).
